records.title: First Battle
records.rewardText: Clear the stage in 3 minutes to receive a bonus reward: Level  1 Infantryman Unit Card.
records.hintText: !cffffffThe enemy Knolls have low stats, but they can be threatening in groups. !c00ffffUse your hero!cffffff to eliminate them before they gather.

records.title: Buster Hunt
records.rewardText: Defend your tower perfectly against enemy attacks to receive a bonus reward: 100 Gold.
records.hintText: !cffffffInfantrymen are incapable of fighting alone. !c00ffffAllocate at least!cffffff !c00ffff2 or more Infantrymen!cffffff at the same time for maximum results.

records.title: Seize Veril
records.rewardText: Upgrade your population for 1 or more times while in the stage to receive a bonus reward: Level  1 Panzer Unit Card.
records.hintText: !cffffffTo deal with an army of enemies, !c00ffffyou must upgrade!cffffff !c00ffffyour population at the Tower menu!cffffff.

records.title: Into the Enemy Camp
records.rewardText: Clear the stage without losing more than 10 units to receive a bonus reward: 200 Gold.
records.hintText: !cffffffThe enemy Short Hair is a fast, aggressive unit. !c00ffffUse Panzers with high Defense!cffffff !c00ffffto hold off Short Hairs!cffffff from advancing to your tower.

records.title: Arang's Challenge
records.rewardText: Keep your hero alive throughout the stage to receive a bonus reward: 200 Cash. (Can be used to unlock an additional slot.)
records.hintText: !cffffffArang is a threatening attacker. !c00ffffUse Panzers!cffffff !c00ffffto protect Vincent!cffffff while fighting.

records.title: Seize Kaleck
records.rewardText: Clear the stage in 3 minutes to receive a bonus reward: Level  1 Calvary Unit Card.
records.hintText: !cffffff!c00ffffProduce Panzers quickly!cffffff before the enemy approaches your tower.

records.title: Bittersweet Return
records.rewardText: Upgrade your mana for 1 or more times while in the stage to receive a bonus reward: Level  1 Hunter Unit Card.
records.hintText: !cffffffYou can produce more advanced units at a higher Mana Level. !c00ffffUse the Tower menu!cffffff !c00ffffto upgrade your mana!cffffff.

records.title: Buster Retaliation
records.rewardText: Clear the stage without losing more than 5 units to receive a bonus reward: 1000 Gold.
records.hintText: !cffffff!cff0005Minotaurs!cffffff boast !cff0005high Defense!cffffff. Deal with them using !c00ffffHunters!cffffff !c00ffffwith high Attack Strength!cffffff.

records.title: New Enemy
records.rewardText: Clear the stage in 3 minutes to receive a bonus reward: Level  1 Spearman Unit Card.
records.hintText: !cffffffTo deal with a variety of enemy units, !c00ffffdefend with Panzers!cffffff  and !c00ffffattack with Hunters!cffffff  for smooth combat.

records.title: Reclaim Iron
records.rewardText: Keep your hero alive throughout the stage to receive a bonus reward: Level  1 Thief Unit Card.
records.hintText: !cffffff!cff0005Arbalests!cffffff inflicts piercing damage !cff0005on multiple targets!cffffff.  Make sure to eliminate them!cffffff using !c00ffffthe area-effective Spearmen!cffffff before

records.title: Road to Lydia
records.rewardText: Upgrade your mana for 2 or more times while in the stage to receive a bonus reward: 200 Cash.
records.hintText: !cffffffAre your units too weak? Use Gold or Cash and upgrade your units for enhanced powers.

records.title: Surrounding Enemies
records.rewardText: Upgrade your Attack/Defense for 1 or more times while in the stage to receive a bonus reward: Level  1 Rider Unit Card.
records.hintText: !cffffffIt is difficult to deal with multiple enemies using only the default slots. !c00ffffExtend your slots!cffffff for smoother gameplay.

records.title: Reclaim Lydia
records.rewardText: Defend your tower perfectly against enemy attacks to receive a bonus reward: 200 Cash.
records.hintText: !cffffffIf you have a hard time clearing a stage, use !c00ffffitems!cffffff.  You can also try to change the !c00ffffskills!cffffff of your hero.

records.title: Evacuate the Palace
records.rewardText: Clear the stage without losing more than 10 units to receive a bonus reward: Level  1 Artillery Unit Card.
records.hintText: !cffffffUse !c00ffffPanzers!cffffff to hold off the enemy !cff0005horsemen!cffffff while attacking their !cff0005hunters!cffffff with your !c00ffffhorsemen!cffffff.

records.title: To the Free Trade Harbor
records.rewardText: Clear the stage in 3 minutes to receive a bonus reward: 100 Cash.
records.hintText: !cffffff!cff0005Cavalry and Riders!cffffff boast a !cff0005high Movement Speed!cffffff.  Beware of a possible raid.

records.title: Persistent Pursuers
records.rewardText: Keep your hero alive throughout the stage to receive a bonus reward: Level  1 Medic Unit Card.
records.hintText: !cffffff!cff0005Thieves!cffffff can steal mana, but they are vulnerable to melee attacks.  Use them to!c00ffff eliminate the enemy units quickly!cffffff before they do.

records.title: Hindsight
records.rewardText: Clear the stage without losing more than 10 units to receive a bonus reward: 2000 Gold.
records.hintText: !cffffffPosition !c00ffffMedics!cffffff right behind !c00ffffPanzers!cffffff to keep them alive for a longer duration.

records.title: Defend the Free Trade Harbor
records.rewardText: Defend your tower perfectly against enemy attacks to receive a bonus reward: Level  1 Glider Unit Card.
records.hintText: !cffffffDeal with the enemy !cff0005pairs of Panzer and Medic!cffffff using !c00ffffArtillery!cffffff units.

records.title: The Mysterious Elven
records.rewardText: Clear the stage without using aerial units to receive a bonus reward: 100 Cash.
records.hintText: !cffffffUse !c00ffffArtillery!cffffff units to attack the enemy while keeping !cff0005Sword Masters!cffffff at bay.

records.title: Purpose of the Elven
records.rewardText: Clear the stage in 3 minutes to receive a bonus reward: Level  1 Shielder Unit Card.
records.hintText: !cffffffThe enemy !cff0005Casters!cffffff use magic to !cff0005attack your long-ranged/support!cffffff !cff0005units!cffffff. Make sure to guard your !c00ffffMedics and Artillery!cffffff uni
